email.subject: A personal note from your Relationship Manager
email.body:
Dear Sunil,

I hope you're well. Your relationship with PCOP means a great deal to us, and I noticed some recent changes in your account that I'd like to discuss.

I've taken the liberty of arranging a Fee Waiver as a token of our appreciation for your continued trust in us. This has been applied to your account automatically.

Please don't hesitate to call me at 1800-XXX-XXXX or simply reply to this email.

Best regards,
Deepa Krishnan
Relationship Manager, PCOP

email.subject: A personal note from your Relationship Manager
email.body:
Dear Pankaj,

I wanted to reach out personally as your Relationship Manager at PCOP. I've noticed some changes in your account over the past few weeks and would love the opportunity to speak with you directly.

As a valued customer, I've arranged a Retention Offer for your account â€” no paperwork needed on your end. I'd also love to understand if there's anything we can do better.

Could we find 15 minutes this week? My direct line is 1800-XXX-XXXX.

Warm regards,
Vikram Joshi
Senior Relationship Manager, PCOP
